allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "php|xampp|wamp|laragon|mysql|apache|composer" } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(docker inspect phd_feed_db --format "{{json .State.Health}}" 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Log | Select-Object -Last 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Exit: $\($_.ExitCode\)"; Write-Host "Output: $\($_.Output\)" })
PowerShell(docker logs phd_feed_app 2>&1 | Out-String | Select-String "SQLSTATE|Exception|Caused|000001|000002" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Select-Object -First 10 Value)
PowerShell(docker exec phd_feed_app php yii migrate --interactive=0 2>&1)
